data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: TraineeNotFound
data.value: Trainee with id {0} was not be found.

data.name: MentorNotFound
data.value: Mentor with id {0} was not found.

data.name: AssignmentNotFound
data.value: Task Assignment with id {0} was not found.

data.name: SubmissionNotFound
data.value: Submission with id {0} was not found.

data.name: ReviewNotFound
data.value: Review with id {0} was not found.

data.name: TaskNotFound
data.value: Learning Task with id {0} was not found.

data.name: InvalidToken
data.value: The provided authentication token is invalid.
